findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_context" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Build a formatted context block for the current topic. Omit topic and collection to show the text collection picker (Memxus menu flow). Call list_collections wh…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

description: Retrieve the full content and metadata of one memory by its UUID. Use after list_memories or recall returned a truncated preview and you need the complete text. Returns content, memory_type, tags, collection, importance, and the creation timestamp. Get the UUID from a prior list_memories or recall r

description.name: list_collections
description.description: List memory collections (folders/scopes) for this user. GitHub/Notion syncs appear under project:<slug> when unified collections are enabled. Call before scoped recall/get_context when the user mentions a project name. To see which team workspaces you can pass as workspace: <name> to other tools, re

description.name: forget
description.description: Permanently delete one memory by UUID. When to use: user asks to remove outdated or incorrect context, or to free plan storage. When NOT: fix content → update (mode=replace); find the ID first → list_memories or recall. Requires delete OAuth scope. Non-idempotent: deleting the same memory_id twice f

description.name: memory_stats
description.description: Show aggregate statistics about stored memories: the total count, a breakdown by memory_type and by collection, and storage bytes used versus the plan limit. Use to understand what is stored before browsing with list_memories, or to check remaining storage capacity. To show stats for a team workspac

description.name: update
description.description: Update an existing memory by ID. Use mode replace (default) to patch fields, or append to extend content. Re-embeds only when content changes. The target workspace is always the one the memory itself belongs to (echoed in resolved_workspace); optionally pass workspace: <name> as a safety confirmatio

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "remember" stacks urgency/override words (important, always). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Save important information to long-term memory. Always set collection when the topic is clear: project work → project:<slug>, personal tastes → personal:prefere…
